ID: US-OLV-033
Title: Manage account actions
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want to track action items by owner, due date, and status
So that commitments from account work are visible

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] ActionsSection lists account actions with status controls.
- [ ] Users can add and edit action fields.
- [ ] Date/status filters affect visible actions.
- [ ] Deleting an action uses confirmation or undo behavior.

Notes: Section header, filters, and body wrappers were refined after initial port.
